site.name: Let's Eat & Greet
site.tagline: Authentic Indian flavours for every celebration
site.description: Vegetarian & non-vegetarian catering from 20 to 150 guests. South Indian home-style cooking, Vijayawada street specialities & more.
site.hours: Mon–Sat: 9 am – 8 pm · Sun: 10 am – 6 pm

hero.badge: Housewarming Specialists · Indian Catering · Hayes, London
hero.heading: Authentic Indian flavours for every celebration
hero.subtext: Vegetarian & non-vegetarian catering from 20 to 150 guests. South Indian home-style cooking, Vijayawada street specialities & more.

about.heading: Home-style Indian cooking, served with warmth
about.body: Let's Eat & Greet Ltd is a Hayes-based catering company specialising in authentic Indian cuisine. We serve both vegetarian and non-vegetarian menus, with a particular passion for vegetarian cooking rooted in South Indian tradition.

features.title: Housewarming Experts
features.detail: We specialise in griha pravesham & housewarming feasts — traditional menus, perfect portions.

features.title: South Indian & Vijayawada Cuisine
features.detail: Bobbatlu, Karam Mirchi bajji, Vijayawada street snacks & more regional delicacies.

features.title: 20 to 150 Guests
features.detail: Intimate family gatherings or large community celebrations — we scale to your event.

features.title: Based in Hayes, London
features.detail: Serving Greater London & surrounding areas from our registered kitchen in Hayes.

items.name: Paneer Tikka
items.description: Marinated cottage cheese grilled with peppers & onions. Served with mint chutney.

items.name: Bobbatlu (Puran Poli)
items.description: Sweet flatbread stuffed with chana dal & jaggery — a traditional South Indian housewarming staple.

items.name: Karam Mirchi Bajji
items.description: Vijayawada's famous stuffed green chilli fritters — crispy, spicy & utterly addictive.

items.name: Dal Tadka & Sambar
items.description: Slow-cooked lentils tempered with mustard, curry leaves & dried chilli — served with rice.

items.name: Vegetable Dum Biryani
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice slow-cooked with seasonal vegetables, saffron & whole spices.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Tender chicken pieces layered with basmati rice, fried onions & aromatic whole spices.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Rich tomato-cream gravy with soft cottage cheese cubes — a consistent crowd favourite.

items.name: Paramannam & Gulab Jamun
items.description: Traditional sweet rice pudding alongside syrup-soaked milk dumplings.

items.name: South Indian Filter Coffee
items.description: Strong, frothy decoction coffee — the perfect close to any South Indian feast.

packages.name: Small Gathering
packages.description: Ideal for housewarmings, naming ceremonies & intimate family lunches.

packages.name: Family Celebration
packages.description: Weddings, birthdays & religious ceremonies with a full South Indian spread.
features: Filter coffee or masala chai station

packages.name: Grand Feast
packages.description: Our maximum capacity — a full banquet with live counters & multiple courses.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: The Bobbatlu and filter coffee were exactly like home. Every guest loved the food — Eat & Greet made our griha pravesham truly special.

testimonials.name: Raj Mehta
testimonials.quote: Organised, punctual, and the food quality was restaurant-level. The Karam Mirchi Bajji counter was a massive hit.

testimonials.name: Anita & Karthik
testimonials.quote: The South Indian spread was incredible — Paramannam, Pulihora, Sambar — everything tasted authentic and fresh.
